mapper.insert: insert into articles ( title, slug, content_markdown, content_html, content_text, summary, cover_url, category_id, location, is_top, is_essence, is_outdated, copyright_type, source_url, source_title, copyright_license, published_at, status ) values ( #{title}, #{slug}, #{markdown}, #{html}, #{text}, #{summary}, #{cover}, #{categoryId}, #{location}, #{top}, #{essence}, #{outdated}, #{copyrightType}, #{sourceUrl}, #{sourceTitle}, #{copyrightLicense}, #{publishTime}, 'DRAFT' )
mapper.update: update articles set title = #{title}, slug = #{slug}, content_markdown = #{markdown}, content_html = #{html}, content_text = #{text}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{cover}, category_id = #{categoryId}, location = #{location}, is_top = #{top}, is_essence = #{essence}, is_outdated = #{outdated}, copyright_type = #{copyrightType}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, source_title = #{sourceTitle}, copyright_license = #{copyrightLicense}, published_at = #{publishTime}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
update articles set status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = coalesce(published_at, current_timestamp), updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id from articles where status = 'DRAFT' and published_at is not null and published_at > updated_at and published_at <= current_timestamp order by published_at asc, id asc
mapper.update: update articles set status = 'DRAFT', updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{id}
